summary: Core ArtifactCleanup.ps1 is functional and well-structured, but deliverable has significant gaps. Missing: (1) Set-StrictMode -Version Latest in main script; (2) actionlint validation run (task requires this); (3) ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 file exists but not provided—workflow references it at line 32; (4) Pester install logic is verbose/redundant (install→import silent→import again, lines 11-17); (5) Verification steps 41–72 duplicate nearly identical test logic—should be factored into single parameterized step. Hardcoded test fixtures in workflow make extending test cases difficult. Run-TestHarness.ps1 has brittle expectations (exact byte counts: 367001600). No validation that expected files/act/Docker are present before execution.
